title: Remove restore as podman subcommand
body:
The commands checkpoint and restore should only be available under
'podman container'. This is probably a result of the recent cobra
migration.

Signed-off-by: Adrian Reber <areber@redhat.com>

comments.body: Fix for the inconsistency reported in #2191

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *adrianreber*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Would it make sense to also, within this PR, update `cmd/podman/checkpoint.go:35-37`, changing `podman checkpoint` to `podman container checkpoint`?
@edsantiago I will fix that in a new PR. Thanks for pointing it out.
